title: Restrict column view for the file column
excerpt: Being able to restrict column view in the file column will be able to add viewers (outsiders) for projects but keep PO’s, invoices, and other documents for internal personnel only.

posts.author: sremus (Stefan Remus)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to restrict column view in the file column will be able to add viewers (outsiders) for projects but keep PO’s, invoices, and other documents for internal personnel only.
